features: Make washing easy with MAGIC LEAVES NON-BIO, the ultra-lightweight and eco-friendly detergent sheets that fully dissolve in water. The smart way to wash (Also available in BIO).
One water-soluble laundry sheet ensures a deep clean and radiant freshness. The full washing power develops even at low temperatures (from 20¬∞C) and also during quick wash cycles.
Washing the sustainable way: the CLIMATE NEUTRAL laundry sheets are free from microplastic, free from preservatives. Also vegan and dermatologically tested so kind to skin.

The eco-friendly and climate-neutral laundry detergent sheets are perfectly pre-dosed, 100% soluble in water while being highly efficient. Thanks to the convenient format, less storage space is required.

MAGIC LEAVES are easy and convenient to use: the effortless way to wash your laundry, simply put the sheet into the drum with the laundry. Also suitable for hand wash. Help us to reduce CO2- emissions: Choose a compact and eco-friendly format!
description: Product Description "DR. BECKMANN MAGIC LEAVES NON-BIO LAUNDRY DETERGENT SHEETS - THE SMART WAY TO WASH YOUR LAUNDRY!Discover the feather-light laundry detergent sheets that make washing so convenient. One water-soluble sheet ensures a deep clean and radiant freshness - even at low temperatures.Make washing easy: Just pop one sheet into the washing drum and experience a highly convenient way to wash your laundry - even on quick wash cycles. The ultra-lightweight and compact format is easy to carry, easy to store, minimises packaging waste and the carbon footprint.‚Ä¢ Easy to transport, easy to store‚Ä¢ Easy to use, no overdosing‚Ä¢ Suitable for short wash cycles‚Ä¢ Works from 20 - 60¬∞C‚Ä¢Free from microplastic‚Ä¢ Free from preservatives‚Ä¢ Less packaging waste‚Ä¢ Vegan Help us to reduce CO2 emissions: Choose a compact and eco-friendly format.CLIMATE NEUTRAL Product Directions for useWashing machine:1. Put the sheet directly into the drum.2. Fill drum with laundry (up to 4.5 kg).3. Start a regular washing cycle.Hand Wash:1. Use half a sheet and dissolve in warm or cold water.2. Add laundry and wash by hand (up to 2.5 kg).3. Thoroughly rinse with water. Important InformationKeep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. Do not touch with damp or wet hands. For best results, we recommend placing the sheet in the empty drum first. Do not use in the dispenser or in a dryer. Always follow the garment care labels. Pre-treat stubborn stains with a stain remover, e.g. Dr. Beckmann Stain Devils. Not suitable for wool or silk. Wash non-colourfast laundry separately."
